title: “Stress causes breast cancer”
body:
At my acupuncture appointment to help alleviate Tamoxifen side effects, the acupuncturist told me about another BC patient she’s treating. According to her oncologist “the stress of losing both her husband and her mother in a short period of time caused her breast cancer.” 

Mind you, I’m already vulnerable on the table with needles being stuck in me. And my story is very similar, I lost a good friend and my mother within five months of each other. The acupuncturist knew this. I’m also suffering from stress and anxiety. She knows this too. 

I told her that my oncologist said there’s no way of knowing exactly how this happened to me. Her response? Well we know how detrimental stress is on the body and that it weakens the immune system so that it can’t fight off certain diseases… 

I gave up and stopped responding. Eventually she moved on. I’m not happy. This feels like bullshit to me. But when I told my husband, he says she’s only trying to help. And that I’m taking it too personally. 

What else to do when things like this happen?
